chunks.page_summary: This page provides details about the identifiable markings on Rheonics sensors and the SME transmitter, explaining their location and purpose.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

Marking of Rheonics Sensors

Modified on: Mon, 15 Apr, 2024 at 6:08 PM

Rheonics ensures that every sensor is labeled with identifiable markings on its housing and probes. These markings are strategically placed to assist customers in quickly locating critical information when troubleshooting or referencing any issues.

1. Transmitter:

The Rheonics SME is properly labeled in each of its ports to properly indicate the Power input, RS-485 port, sensor LED status, SD card port, display port, analog output signals, Ethernet Port, Sensor connector port, Rheonics Logo and Electronics serial number.

[Image of Rheonics SME transmitter with various ports and labels]

Figure 1. Transmitter markings

Additionally, the transmitter will have a tag attached to one of its sides with the Sensor serial number and electronics serial number that corresponds to it.
key_facts: Rheonics labels every sensor with identifiable markings on its housing and probes.
These markings are strategically placed to assist customers in quickly locating critical information for troubleshooting or referencing.
The Rheonics SME transmitter has properly labeled ports for Power input, RS-485, sensor LED status, SD card, display, analog output, Ethernet, and sensor connection.
The transmitter also features a Rheonics Logo and an Electronics serial number.
A tag with the Sensor serial number and electronics serial number will be attached to one side of the transmitter.

chunks.page_summary: This page provides details on how to identify Rheonics viscometer and density sensor components by examining their external and internal labels, including specific model and serial numbers.
chunks.extracted_text:
Figure 2. Transmitter label
SRV Sensor = B09-1194
SME-DRM = 19101399

2. Sensor probe:
The Rheonics sensor probe has the following information marked in its body: Sensor type, Sensor serial number according to purchase order, and the Manufacturer name.

Figure 3. Sensor Probe marking
(Text visible on probe: rheonics, patented swiss made, Type: SRV, S/N: B09-1194, Rheonics GmbH, Switzerland, CE)

3. SME-TRD-Internal label
All Rheonics SME-TRD, inside will have a label with the Sensor serial number, electronics serial number, and display serial number written on it.
key_facts: The transmitter label specifies the SRV Sensor model number as B09-1194 and the SME-DRM serial number as 19101399.
Rheonics sensor probes are marked with the sensor type, sensor serial number based on the purchase order, and the manufacturer name.
An example sensor probe indicates 'Type: SRV' and 'S/N: B09-1194', manufactured by 'Rheonics GmbH Switzerland', and is 'patented swiss made'.
All Rheonics SME-TRD units contain an internal label detailing the Sensor serial number, electronics serial number, and display serial number.
warnings_notes: CE Logo (indicates compliance with European standards).

Figure 4. Internal label in SME-TRD that indicates sensor information
key_facts: The device is designed for viscosity and density monitoring and automation.
It supports multiple communication protocols including HART, Modbus RTU, Modbus TCP, Modbus Master (RS485), and PROFIBUS.
The product is stated to be 'Swiss made'.
The SME-TRD electronics unit has a serial number of 191016776.
The SRV Sensor component has a serial number of B09-1194.
The display component has a serial number of S01-0908.
The device provides a 4-20 mA analog output.
The internal electronics board includes connectivity options such as USB, SD-card, Ethernet, and Modbus (RS-485).
The device is identified as revision 1.0.
